final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 grid infographic for Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) health and wellness content.

Style/medium: infographic, editorial design, clean minimalist layout, soft 3D illustration accents, magazine-quality
Composition: 3x3 grid layout (3 columns × 3 rows), clear boundaries between cells, centered content in each cell, generous whitespace
Subject: 8 sleep tips for better rest, women's wellness lifestyle content
Scene/backdrop: cream white, light beige, oat, soft caramel color palette with warm brown text
Lighting/mood: warm, healing, cozy, sleep therapy theme
Color palette: cream white, light beige, pale oat, soft caramel, dark brown text accents
Materials/textures: soft fabric textures for pillows/bedding, matte surfaces, gentle gradients
Text (verbatim): "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", "3. 房间温度别太高", "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", "7. 固定上床时间", "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
Constraints: 3:4 vertical aspect ratio, 9-grid layout for easy slicing into 9 separate posts, all text in Chinese, no English, each cell must work as standalone image, clear spacing between cells, large readable text, professional new media aesthetic, no cheap marketing feel
Avoid: garbled text, cluttered layout, overly flashy decoration, cheap marketing aesthetic, text near grid borders
